metaDescription: Qwen3.7-Plus (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2026-06-02 — part of the Qwen-Plus (multimodal agent) line. Multimodal agent model adding image/video understanding, de…
overview: Qwen3.7-Plus is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-Plus (multimodal agent) line. Released 2026-06-02. Proprietary, API-only mid-tier/multimodal sibling to Max — cheaper, and from 3.7 onward a vision-capable agent model that reads screens and drives GUIs.

What's notable in this version: Multimodal agent model adding image/video understanding, deep reasoning, tool invocation and autonomous iteration on top of the 3.7 base; proprietary, API-only via the Bailian/Model Studio platform.
